content:
Hi guys,

Please check your email inbox for an email like this!
If you are a new volunteer and did not find this email + a google group notice email saying you've been added/invited to join the group, please let me know.

📢 We're looking for moderators!

We still need 1 moderator for each of the following languages: DE, FR, ES, PT, VN, ID, JP, KR, TH, and Traditional Chinese!

Moderators will be added to our moderators-only channel, where you'll help coordinate progress and organize your language's translation efforts.

For all languages except Traditional Chinese, we will be prioritizing volunteers who have already contributed to the GitHub repo at least once. Traditional Chinese is newly added, so all interested volunteers are welcome!

If you're interested, please DM me 📩
